name: ZipLink
query: query DownloadAllButtonQuery($workflowRunId: String) { ZipLink(workflowRunId: $workflowRunId) { error url } }

name: ValidateUserCanDeleteObjects
query: query BulkDeleteModalQuery($selectedIds: [Int], $selectedIdsStrings: [String], $workflow: String!, $authenticityToken: String!) { ValidateUserCanDeleteObjects(input: {selectedIds: $selectedIds, selectedIdsStrings: $selectedIdsStrings, workflow: $workflow, authenticityToken: $authenticityToken}) { validIdsStrings invalidSampleNames error } }

name: MetadataFields
query: query MetadataFieldsQuery($snapshotLinkId: String, $sampleIds: [String]!, $authenticityToken: String!) { MetadataFields(snapshotLinkId: $snapshotLinkId, input: {sampleIds: $sampleIds, authenticityToken: $authenticityToken}) { key dataType name options host_genome_ids description is_required isBoolean group } }

name: BulkDownloadCGOverview
query: query BulkDownloadModalQuery($workflowRunIdsStrings: [String], $includeMetadata: Boolean!, $downloadType: String!, $workflow: String!, $authenticityToken: String!) { BulkDownloadCGOverview(input: {workflowRunIdsStrings: $workflowRunIdsStrings, includeMetadata: $includeMetadata, downloadType: $downloadType, workflow: $workflow, authenticityToken: $authenticityToken}) { cgOverviewRows } }
